news.title: Norges Bank Makes New $90.49 Million Investment in Axsome Therapeutics, Inc. $AXSM - MarketBeat
news.summary: Axsome Therapeutics reported strong Q4 earnings that beat expectations, with analysts seeing over 23% upside. The stock also surged on FDA approval for an Alzheimer's drug, and the company settled SUNOSI patent litigation, removing a key overhang.
